text.title: AI Feature GA Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for ai-feature-ga-checklist.

decision-tree.root-question: Is every GA check either PASS or WAIVED with written justification + expiry?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — fix failing check before GA
BLOCK — every waiver needs an expiry date
LAUNCH — publish GA decision + archive evidence
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
